issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases beyond the examples.
The skill assumes a Python runtime and specific libraries, limiting portability to other agent environments.

scenarios.name: Generate quarterly business report as .docx
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses python-docx with generic Table Grid but omits Pt/Cm measurements and section.header/footer; treatment applies the built-in Light Grid Accent 1 style with explicit Cm page setup and section header/footer.

scenarios.name: Mail merge offer letters from CSV
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on python-docx string replacement that breaks on Jinja loops/conditionals; treatment uses DocxTemplate.render with csv.DictReader exactly as the skill prescribes.
